summary: Created bin/lib/replan.mjs with buildReplanBrief, parseReplanOutput, and applyReplan functions. Modified bin/lib/run.mjs to dispatch a re-plan agent at both blocked sites (review fail and gate fail after max retries), injecting new tasks into the execution queue when the agent returns a split or inject verdict. Added a re-planned task counter to bin/lib/status.mjs and wrote 28 passing unit tests in test/replan.test.mjs covering all verdicts and edge cases.
